The evidence for spike protein shedding has grown from theoretical concern to documented reality.

item.title: The Food Pyramid Lie: Decades of Dietary Deception
item.description: The USDA Food Pyramid was never about health — it was a marketing tool for the grain industry, built on fraudulent science by Ancel Keys, protected by sugar industry payoffs, and designed to keep Americans sick, fat, and dependent on a medical system that profits from their illness.

item.title: Carbon Credit Coup: Trading the Air You Breathe
item.description: Carbon credits are not about saving the planet. They are a financial instrument designed to commodify the air itself, creating a new asset class controlled by the same institutions that caused the environmental destruction they claim to be solving.

item.title: The Censorship Industrial Complex: How Free Speech Died
item.description: How the U.S. government built a sprawling network of federal agencies, Big Tech platforms, universities, and NGOs to systematically censor dissenting speech — exposed through the Twitter Files, the Trusted News Initiative, CISA, and the Stanford Internet Observatory.

item.title: Daniel's Seventy Weeks: The Prophetic Timeline Decoded
item.description: Daniel 9:24-27 contains the most precise prophetic timeline in all of Scripture. The seventy weeks prophecy predicted the exact date of the Messiah's arrival and provides the framework for understanding the end of days.

item.title: Bee Colony Collapse: When the Food Chain Breaks
item.description: Colony collapse disorder is decimating bee populations worldwide, driven by neonicotinoid pesticides championed by Monsanto and Bayer. Without pollinators, one-third of the human food supply faces extinction — and the corporations responsible continue to deny responsibility while patenting robotic replacements.

item.title: Bail-Ins: Your Money Is Not Yours
item.description: The legal framework for seizing depositor funds during bank failures already exists. From the Cyprus 2013 precedent to Dodd-Frank bail-in provisions, your bank deposit is not what you think it is — you are an unsecured creditor, and your money is their lifeline.

item.title: The Military-Pharmaceutical Partnership: Soldiers and Syringes
item.description: The merger of the Department of Defense and the pharmaceutical industry has created a biodefense-industrial complex where vaccines are developed as military countermeasures, funded through Other Transaction Authority contracts that bypass normal regulatory oversight, and deployed to military personnel as mandatory experimental interventions.

item.title: China and the Kings of the East: Biblical Prophecy Unfolding
item.description: Revelation's 'kings of the east' prophecy and China's rise as a superpower. The drying of the Euphrates and the gathering of eastern armies point to events now taking shape on the world stage.

item.title: Medical History Rewritten: The Lies They Taught You About Disease
item.description: The official history of modern medicine is a carefully constructed narrative designed to legitimize the pharmaceutical monopoly. From the suppression of terrain theory to the erasure of natural cures, the Rockefeller-funded rewriting of medical history has deceived generations into believing that petrochemical drugs are the pinnacle of human healing.

item.title: Zombies Walk America: The Spiritual Death of a Nation
item.description: Spiritual death in modern society manifests as a walking death — millions alive physically but dead spiritually, without discernment, without awareness, without connection to the Creator. Ephesians 2:1 calls them 'dead in trespasses and sins.'

item.title: Informed Consent Destroyed: How They Stole Your Right to Choose
item.description: The systematic destruction of medical informed consent during the COVID-19 era represents the most egregious violation of the Nuremberg Code since its creation. Emergency Use Authorization bypassed decades of safety protocols, employer mandates coerced compliance, and the fundamental human right to bodily autonomy was stripped away under the guise of public health.

item.title: Tower of Babel 2.0: Rebuilding the Gateway to Heaven
item.description: Genesis 11 records humanity's first attempt at a unified world order — the Tower of Babel. The modern globalization project, from the United Nations to transhumanism, is the second attempt. The ambition is the same. The judgment will be the same.

item.title: The Antichrist Algorithm: When the Digital Beast Awakens
item.description: How AI and digital systems could fulfill biblical Antichrist prophecy. The merger of technology and spiritual deception is not a future possibility but a present reality being assembled in plain sight.

item.title: Bioweapons and Gain-of-Function: Engineering the Next Plague
item.description: The documented history of gain-of-function research, from Fort Detrick's biological weapons program to the Wuhan Institute of Virology, reveals a decades-long pipeline where military agencies fund the engineering of supercharged pathogens under the guise of pandemic preparedness. DARPA, NIH, and EcoHealth Alliance form the triad that outsourced America's bioweapons research to foreign laboratories.
